content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (after iter-017)

## Headline
- **1.4 `exists_free_resolution_step` is CLOSED** (sorryAx-free, verified by `#print axioms`). Sorry 7→5. The affine-bridge + free-resolution sub-lane (open since iter-012) is DONE. Do NOT re-open it.
- Cost: 2 new `External.*` axioms (9→11). The boundary is now substantial — manage it deliberately (see §Axioms).

## CRITICAL (structural — already fixed this session, verify it sticks)
- **`\Fin` macro** was undefined (used in `lem:tilde_free_fin`, Basic chapter L1286–1294) → `leanblueprint web` crashes with `RecursionError`. **Review agent added `\providecommand{\Fin}{\operatorname{Fin}}` to `blueprint/src/macros/common.tex`.** Planner: confirm no other undefined macros were introduced; the doctor's "Malformed annotations" section will be clean next iter if so.

## Axioms — user/planner action
- 11 `External.*` axioms now (doctor re-flags all). The 2 newest — `External.pullback_isFreeMod` (L566), `External.pullback_isLFP` (L577) — are paper-faithful AK §1 (1.4) Step-3 pullback-preservation facts, buildable-later. **Recommend the user add both to `archon-protected.yaml`** (TO_USER carries this).
- Both reduce to ONE Mathlib gap worth a future upstream/build push: `(Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj 𝒪_Y ≅ 𝒪_X` (structure-sheaf pullback for a general scheme morphism). `pullbackObjFreeIso` exists but needs `[(Opens.map p.base).Final]` (absent v4.30.0). If/when that final-functor instance or a direct structure-sheaf-pullback iso lands in Mathlib, BOTH anchors discharge to real proofs. **Do NOT retry the direct `pullbackObjFreeIso` route in-loop** — confirmed absent 5+ ways across iters 016–017.

## Next target — pick from the 5 remaining §1 sorries
The lane must now PIVOT off the affine bridge. Each remaining sorry is gated on a DISTINCT absent brick; the planner should make a deliberate anchor-vs-build call per target (do not auto-anchor — the axiom budget is getting large):
- `H_tensor_invertible` (L623) & `H_tensor` (L631) — twist/right-exactness of `H`; gated on the PAUSED monoidal layer (`MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules)` / `tensorMod` associator — ARCHON_MEMORY says this route is FALSE-by-counterexample for direct local-injectivity; needs stalks). **Likely the hardest; recommend NOT first.**
- `exists_acyclic_surjection` (L643, 1.2) — needs `j_!` (extension-by-zero) / acyclic resolution. No Mathlib `j_!` for `SheafOfModules`. Candidate for an anchor if planner wants a cheap closure.
- `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (L652, 1.3) — needs `External.adjunction` (not yet anchored) + the fiber-Ext machinery. Note `H_represents` (1.1.1, L614) is already CLOSED via `External.H_existence`, so 1.1 partially done.
- `ext_finite_flat` (L666, 1.10(i)) — `IsOpen` half already closed via `External.ext_vanishing_open`; the residual `sorry` (L675) is blocked on `IsLFPAndFlatOn` being opaque (no constructor) — needs `R^q f_*` infra. **Realize `IsLFPAndFlatOn` def first** (ARCHON_MEMORY: opaque stub ⇒ unprovable conclusion until def realized).
- **Recommended ordering:** `exists_acyclic_surjection` (1.2) or the `IsLFPAndFlatOn`-realization for `ext_finite_flat` are the most tractable next concrete moves; the monoidal pair stays deferred until the stalk layer exists.

## Process note (convergence)
- iters 012–017 closed the entire affine bridge via a mix of built lemmas + 6 anchored EGA/Stacks inputs feeding 1.4. This was genuine progress (1.4 is real), but the pattern is "close §1 theorems by anchoring their cited inputs." Before the next deep §1 closure, the planner should decide whether the project's goal accepts that pattern broadly or wants selected anchors built down. Flag to the user via the standing TO_USER decision bullet.

## No coverage debt
- `dag-query unmatched` = 0, `gaps` = 0. Planner pre-blueprinted all iter-017 decls. Nothing to restore.
